series_metadata.series_description: Records on the award and denial of community capital assistance funds for facilities for individuals with developmental disabilities;issues related to the construction, renovation, or improvement of a facility for individuals with mental retardation or other developmental disabilities; mortgages, promissory notes, leases, assumption agreements, subordination agreements and other financing/security documents on facilities for individuals with mental retardation and developmental disabilities; utility agreements, and leases for state-run facilities for individuals with mental retardation and other developmental disabilities; contracts, opinion letters/memorandums and other miscellaneous documents on facilities for individuals with developmental disabilities.
